name: waai-flow-root
description: Open-source WhatsApp AI automation platform with visual flows, agents, and Baileys messaging.
author: ZQ Developers

scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend
scripts.setup: npm run install:all && npm run db:push
scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
scripts.render:build: npm ci --prefix backend && npm ci --prefix frontend && npm run prisma:generate --prefix backend && npm run db:push --prefix backend && npm run build --prefix frontend
